name: iom
description: Complete user guide for the IoM (Implant-over-Middleware) C2 framework. Covers architecture concepts, basic operations, startup parameters, authentication configuration, troubleshooting, documentation resources, and community feedback. Trigger conditions: use this skill when the user asks about how IoM works, command usage, architecture concepts, configuration methods, how to troubleshoot issues, where to find documentation, or how to file an issue. Should also trigger for questions like "how do I connect", "what is a session", "I got an error", or "is there documentation".
